organization_id.title: ID of the organization
organization_id.description: This can be found by clicking on your account and going to 'organizations'

project_id.title: ID of the project
project_id.description: This can be found right after you select your organization

public_key.title: Public key
public_key.description: Given to you when you create a new key in organization settings

private_key.title: Private key
private_key.description: Given to you when you create a new key in organization settings

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.description: List of nodes to download logs from

time_period.title: Hours
time_period.description: How many hours of logs do you want to download?

filter_function.title: Filter function
filter_function.description: A JavaScript function that is executed on each log line.

indexes.title: List of indexes
indexes.description: A dump of all existing indexes on the cluster (output of `db.getCollectionNames().map(c => ({ name: c, indexes: db[c].getIndexes() }))`)

notionMcpConnector.title: Notion MCP Connector
notionMcpConnector.description: Connector to a Notion MCP Server. The findings state is stored on a single Notion page identified by Notion Page ID.

notionPageId.title: Notion Page ID
notionPageId.description: The ID of the Notion page that holds the findings state. The actor rewrites this page on every run; do not edit it by hand.

githubMcpConnector.title: GitHub MCP Connector
githubMcpConnector.description: Connect to GitHub MCP server to allow the Actor to create new tickets automatically when new Slow Query is found.

githubRepository.title: GitHub Repository
githubRepository.description: Provide a name of the repository where new issues will be created
